## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `synapse ...`
2. With config `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **OS** | e.g., macOS 14.x / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| **Go Version** | e.g., 1.21.0 |
| **Synapse Version** | e.g., v0.2.0 |
| **Store Backend** | e.g., local-store / github-store |
